entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: The state of food being free from contaminants that could harm the consumer

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production that meets current needs without compromising future generations

entities.name: TOXIC METAL CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of harmful levels of metals or metalloids in the environment

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: Liquid resource essential for plant growth, often contaminated by metals

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The overall physical and mental well-being of humans

entities.name: METALS/METALLOIDS TOXICITY
entities.description: The adverse effects caused by excessive concentrations of metals or metalloids in plants

entities.name: INTERNAL DEFENSE MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological processes plants use to mitigate the effects of toxic metals

entities.name: SECONDARY MESSENGERS
entities.description: Molecules that relay signals from receptors on the cell surface to target molecules inside the cell

entities.name: CELL SIGNALING
entities.description: The process by which a cell responds to signals in its environment

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTIONAL RESPONSES
entities.description: Changes in gene expression in response to external stimuli

entities.name: OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: High-throughput technologies used to analyze large-scale biological data

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of proteins

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of small molecule metabolites

entities.name: IONOMICS
entities.description: The study of the elemental composition of an organism

entities.name: MIRNAOMICS
entities.description: The study of microRNA expression patterns

entities.name: PHENOMICS
entities.description: The study of phenotypes on a large scale

entities.name: MOLECULAR REGULATORS
entities.description: Molecules that control the expression of other genes or proteins

entities.name: TOXIC METAL TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and grow in the presence of toxic metals

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Multicellular eukaryotes that are primary producers in most ecosystems

entities.name: STRESS-RESPONSIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that are activated or repressed in response to environmental stress

entities.name: METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: A linked series of chemical reactions occurring within a cell

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The external factors affecting an organism's growth and survival
